name: Focus Flex
comment: The Focus Flex offers lighting designers the creative flexibility of generating vibrant washes, punchy beams, and eye-catching pixel effects from one compact and quick automated luminaire. Powered by an array of seven potent 40-Watt 4-in-1 RGBW color mixing LEDs, each of which can be controlled independently, it offers a motorized zoom function providing the versatility of a variable field angle of between 6 and 57-degrees. With a variety of DMX mode options appropriate to different applications, it offers virtual CMY color mixing and virtual foreground and background color wheel control as well as a choice of seven different DMX modes.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
